title: Global Reach. Local Expertise.
para1: Yacht Research is an international yacht brokerage firm built on discretion, expertise, and an unwavering commitment to the interests of our clients. With a strong operational presence in Dubai and strategic coverage across France, the Mediterranean, the Middle East, and the United States, we provide a truly global service to an exclusive clientele.
para2: Our approach is defined by a deep understanding of the market, access to private and off-market opportunities, and a network of trusted international partners, enabling seamless transactions wherever in the world the opportunity arises.
quote: You enjoy your yacht — we take care of everything else.
